description: A foreman sees a welder preparing to work and must first ensure a hot work permit has been issued for the area.

nodes.task_description: Check the daily permit log for an active 'Hot Work Permit' for the specified location (e.g., 'Sector C, 2nd Floor').

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms an active hot work permit is on file for the location and time.

nodes.task_description: Verify that a fire watch has been assigned as required by the permit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms in the permit details that a specific worker is assigned as the fire watch.
